commands.review_summary:
The PR projects `sessions_send` inter-session user turns into assistant-side forwarded WebChat display messages, strips the generated inter-session envelope for display, and lets assistant chat groups render sender labels.

PR surface: Source +114, Tests +292. Total +406 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows `sessions_send` creates a user-role inter-session turn, current main does not remap that source tool in display projection, and WebChat currently groups/renders by role with user-only sender labels.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the remaining action is ordinary maintainer merge review and CI gating.

target.title: fix(webchat): show sessions_send handoffs as forwarded
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #89161.

- Project `sessions_send` inter-session user turns as assistant-side WebChat display messages while preserving the persisted transcript `role: "user"` contract.
- Strip the generated inter-session prompt envelope from visible forwarded content.
- Let WebChat assistant groups use `senderLabel`, so forwarded messages render with source attribution such as `Forwarded from main` instead of appearing as `You`.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/sessions/input-provenance.test.ts src/gateway/session-history-state.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts`
- `pnpm format:fix src/gateway/chat-display-projection.ts src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts src/sessions/input-provenance.ts src/sessions/input-provenance.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm tsgo`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test`
- Browser WebChat proof with Control UI E2E mock Gateway, using production `buildSessionHistorySnapshot` projection output as the browser `chat.startup` history source.

Known proof gap:

- `pnpm check:test-types` timed out locally before completion; split relevant core/UI lanes passed and CI `check-test-types` passed.
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test` also timed out locally. This patch does not touch `extensions/`.
- The browser proof uses deterministic mocked Gateway transport with production projection output, not a live provider-backed two-agent run.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `sessions_send` inter-session messages no longer render as right-side user-authored WebChat bubbles; display projection marks them as assistant-side forwarded messages with sender attribution.

Real environment tested: Local source checkout, running OpenClaw production WebChat display projection code through `buildSessionHistorySnapshot`, then rendering the resulting `chat.startup` history in a real Chromium Control UI/WebChat browser session with the existing mocked Gateway WebSocket harness.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran a Playwright/Chromium browser proof via `node --import tsx`. The script feeds a transcript-shaped raw `role: "user"` message with `provenance.kind: "inter_session"` and `sourceTool: "sessions_send"` into `buildSessionHistorySnapshot`, passes `snapshot.history.messages` to `installMockGateway`, opens `/chat`, waits for the forwarded text and attribution, captures a screenshot/video, and reads the rendered DOM.

Evidence after fix:

```
{
  "inputRole": "user",
  "inputSourceTool": "sessions_send",
  "projectedRole": "assistant",
  "projectedSenderLabel": "Forwarded from main",
  "projectedText": "forwarded report from Dollar for browser proof",
  "projectedHasInterSessionEnvelope": false,
  "browserForwardedGroupClass": "chat-group assistant",
  "browserForwardedSender": "Forwarded from main",
  "browserForwardedText": "forwarded report from Dollar for browser proof Forwarded from main Jun 2, 2026, 2:00 AM",
  "browserHasForwardedText": true,
  "browserHasForwardedLabel": true,
  "browserHasInterSessionEnvelope": false,
  "screenshotPath": ".artifacts/control-ui-e2e/sessions-send-forwarded/webchat-sessions-send-forwarded.png",
  "videoPath": ".artifacts/control-ui-e2e/sessions-send-forwarded/page@4dcd3d9dbabdc50973b5b3ba266801e3.webm"
}
```

Observed result after fix: The production WebChat history projection preserves the underlying inter-session provenance, changes the display role to `assistant`, adds `Forwarded from main`, removes the generated `[Inter-session message]` envelope from visible text, and the real browser DOM renders the handoff as `.chat-group assistant` with the forwarded sender label.

What was not tested: Live provider-backed two-agent WebChat run; full local combined `check:test-types`; extensions test type lane.
